description: Shipment tracking records per order. Table name is shipments, not shipping.

chunks.text:
TABLE: shipments

DESCRIPTION: Shipment tracking records per order. Table name is shipments, not shipping.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: shipments, shipping, deliveries, tracking, packages, dispatch, shipped orders

PRIMARY_KEY: shipment_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: order_id → orders.order_id, warehouse_id → warehouses.warehouse_id

COLUMNS: shipment_id, order_id, warehouse_id, carrier, tracking_number, ship_date, estimated_delivery, actual_delivery, shipping_cost, weight_lbs, status

USE_CASES: Delivery status, shipping performance, carrier analysis, late deliveries
